macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_NET_WM_PING
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether the X11 _NET_WM_PING protocol should
be supported.
remarks:
By default SDL will use _NET_WM_PING, but for applications that know
they will not always be able to respond to ping requests in a timely
manner they can turn it off to avoid the window manager thinking the app
is hung.
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Disable _NET_WM_PING.
"1": Enable _NET_WM_PING. (default)
This hint should be set before creating a window.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_NODIRECTCOLOR
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable controlling whether SDL uses DirectColor visuals.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Disable DirectColor visuals.
"1": Enable DirectColor visuals. (default)
This hint should be set before initializing the video subsystem.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_SCALING_FACTOR
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable forcing the content scaling factor for X11 displays.
remarks:
The variable can be set to a floating point value in the range
1.0-10.0f
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_VISUALID
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable forcing the visual ID used for X11 display modes.
remarks: This hint should be set before initializing the video subsystem.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_WINDOW_VISUALID
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable forcing the visual ID chosen for new X11 windows.
remarks: This hint should be set before creating a window.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_X11_XRANDR
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether the X11 XRandR extension should be
used.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Disable XRandR.
"1": Enable XRandR. (default)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_ENABLE_BACK_TOUCH
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether touch should be enabled on the back
panel of the PlayStation Vita.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Disable touch on the back panel.
"1": Enable touch on the back panel. (default)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_ENABLE_FRONT_TOUCH
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether touch should be enabled on the front
panel of the PlayStation Vita.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Disable touch on the front panel.
"1": Enable touch on the front panel. (default)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_MODULE_PATH
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable controlling the module path on the PlayStation Vita.
remarks: This hint defaults to "app0:module"
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_PVR_INIT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether to perform PVR initialization on the
PlayStation Vita.
remarks: "0": Skip PVR initialization.
"1": Perform the normal PVR initialization. (default)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_PVR_OPENGL
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether OpenGL should be used instead of
OpenGL ES on the PlayStation Vita.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Use OpenGL ES. (default)
"1": Use OpenGL.
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_RESOLUTION
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable overriding the resolution reported on the PlayStation
Vita.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"544": 544p (default)
"720": 725p for PSTV
"1080": 1088i for PSTV
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VITA_TOUCH_MOUSE_DEVICE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling which touchpad should generate synthetic mouse
events.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:

"0": Only front touchpad should generate mouse events.
(default)
"1": Only back touchpad should generate mouse events.
"2": Both touchpads should generate mouse events.
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VULKAN_DISPLAY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable overriding the display index used in SDL_Vulkan_CreateSurface ()
remarks: The display index starts at 0, which is the default.
This hint should be set before calling SDL_Vulkan_CreateSurface ()
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_VULKAN_LIBRARY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Specify the Vulkan library to load.
remarks: This hint should be set before creating a Vulkan window or calling SDL_Vulkan_LoadLibrary ().
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WAVE_CHUNK_LIMIT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling the maximum number of chunks in a WAVE
file.
remarks:
This sets an upper bound on the number of chunks in a WAVE file to
avoid wasting time on malformed or corrupt WAVE files. This defaults to
"10000".
This hint should be set before calling SDL_LoadWAV () or SDL_LoadWAV_IO ()
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WAVE_FACT_CHUNK
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling how the fact chunk affects the loading of a
WAVE file.
remarks:
The fact chunk stores information about the number of samples of a
WAVE file. The Standards Update from Microsoft notes that this value can
be used to 'determine the length of the data in seconds'. This is
especially useful for compressed formats (for which this is a mandatory
chunk) if they produce multiple sample frames per block and truncating
the block is not allowed. The fact chunk can exactly specify how many
sample frames there should be in this case.

Unfortunately, most application seem to ignore the fact chunk and so
SDL ignores it by default as well.
The variable can be set to the following values:

"truncate" - Use the number of samples to truncate the wave data if
the fact chunk is present and valid.

"strict" - Like "truncate", but raise an error if the fact chunk is
invalid, not present for non-PCM formats, or if the data chunk doesn't
have that many samples.

"ignorezero" - Like "truncate", but ignore fact chunk if the number
of samples is zero.
"ignore" - Ignore fact chunk entirely. (default)
This hint should be set before calling SDL_LoadWAV () or SDL_LoadWAV_IO ()
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WAVE_RIFF_CHUNK_SIZE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling how the size of the RIFF chunk affects the
loading of a WAVE file.
remarks:
The size of the RIFF chunk (which includes all the sub-chunks of the
WAVE file) is not always reliable. In case the size is wrong, it's
possible to just ignore it and step through the chunks until a fixed
limit is reached.

Note that files that have trailing data unrelated to the WAVE file or
corrupt files may slow down the loading process without a reliable
boundary. By default, SDL stops after 10000 chunks to prevent wasting
time. Use SDL_HINT_WAVE_CHUNK_LIMIT to
adjust this value.
The variable can be set to the following values:

"force" - Always use the RIFF chunk size as a boundary for the chunk
search.

"ignorezero" - Like "force", but a zero size searches up to 4 GiB.
(default)

"ignore" - Ignore the RIFF chunk size and always search up to 4
GiB.

"maximum" - Search for chunks until the end of file. (not
recommended)
This hint should be set before calling SDL_LoadWAV () or SDL_LoadWAV_IO ()
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WAVE_TRUNCATION
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable controlling how a truncated WAVE file is handled.
remarks:
A WAVE file is considered truncated if any of the chunks are
incomplete or the data chunk size is not a multiple of the block size.
By default, SDL decodes until the first incomplete block, as most
applications seem to do.
The variable can be set to the following values:
"verystrict" - Raise an error if the file is truncated.

"strict" - Like "verystrict", but the size of the RIFF chunk is
ignored.
"dropframe" - Decode until the first incomplete sample frame.

"dropblock" - Decode until the first incomplete block.
(default)
This hint should be set before calling SDL_LoadWAV () or SDL_LoadWAV_IO ()
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOW_ACTIVATE_WHEN_RAISED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable controlling whether the window is activated when the SDL_RaiseWindow function is called.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": The window is not activated when the SDL_RaiseWindow function is called.

"1": The window is activated when the SDL_RaiseWindow function is called.
(default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOW_ACTIVATE_WHEN_SHOWN
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable controlling whether the window is activated when the SDL_ShowWindow function is called.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": The window is not activated when the SDL_ShowWindow function is called.

"1": The window is activated when the SDL_ShowWindow function is called.
(default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOW_ALLOW_TOPMOST
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
If set to "0" then never set the top-most flag on an SDL Window even
if the application requests it.
remarks:
This is a debugging aid for developers and not expected to be used by
end users.
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": don't allow topmost
"1": allow topmost (default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOW_FRAME_USABLE_WHILE_CURSOR_HIDDEN
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether the window frame and title bar are
interactive when the cursor is hidden.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:

"0": The window frame is not interactive when the cursor is hidden
(no move, resize, etc).

"1": The window frame is interactive when the cursor is hidden.
(default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_CLOSE_ON_ALT_F4
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether SDL generates window-close events for
Alt+F4 on Windows.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": SDL will only do normal key handling for Alt+F4.

"1": SDL will generate a window-close event when it sees Alt+F4.
(default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_ENABLE_MENU_MNEMONICS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether menus can be opened with their
keyboard shortcut (Alt+mnemonic).
remarks:
If the mnemonics are enabled, then menus can be opened by pressing
the Alt key and the corresponding mnemonic (for example, Alt+F opens the
File menu). However, in case an invalid mnemonic is pressed, Windows
makes an audible beep to convey that nothing happened. This is true even
if the window has no menu at all!

Because most SDL applications don't have menus, and some want to use
the Alt key for other purposes, SDL disables mnemonics (and the beeping)
by default.

Note: This also affects keyboard events: with mnemonics enabled, when
a menu is opened from the keyboard, you will not receive a KEYUP event
for the mnemonic key, and might not receive one for Alt.
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Alt+mnemonic does nothing, no beeping. (default)

"1": Alt+mnemonic opens menus, invalid mnemonics produce a
beep.
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_ENABLE_MESSAGELOOP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether the windows message loop is processed
by SDL.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": The window message loop is not run.
"1": The window message loop is processed in SDL_PumpEvents (). (default)
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_ERASE_BACKGROUND_MODE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether SDL will clear the window contents
when the WM_ERASEBKGND message is received.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0"/"never": Never clear the window.

"1"/"initial": Clear the window when the first WM_ERASEBKGND event
fires. (default)
"2"/"always": Clear the window on every WM_ERASEBKGND event.
This hint should be set before creating a window.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_FORCE_SEMAPHORE_KERNEL
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether SDL uses Kernel Semaphores on
Windows.
remarks:
Kernel Semaphores are inter-process and require a context switch on
every interaction. On Windows 8 and newer, the WaitOnAddress API is
available. Using that and atomics to implement semaphores increases
performance. SDL will fall back to Kernel Objects on older OS versions
or if forced to by this hint.
The variable can be set to the following values:

"0": Use Atomics and WaitOnAddress API when available, otherwise
fall back to Kernel Objects. (default)
"1": Force the use of Kernel Objects in all cases.
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_GAMEINPUT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether GameInput is used for raw keyboard and
mouse on Windows.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:

"0": GameInput is not used for raw keyboard and mouse events.
(default)

"1": GameInput is used for raw keyboard and mouse events, if
available.
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_INTRESOURCE_ICON
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable to specify custom icon resource id from RC file on Windows
platform.
remarks: This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_INTRESOURCE_ICON_SMALL
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable to specify custom icon resource id from RC file on Windows
platform.
remarks: This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_RAW_KEYBOARD
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether raw keyboard events are used on
Windows.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:

"0": The Windows message loop is used for keyboard events.
(default)
"1": Low latency raw keyboard events are used.
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_RAW_KEYBOARD_EXCLUDE_HOTKEYS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether or not the RIDEV_NOHOTKEYS flag is set
when enabling Windows raw keyboard events.
remarks:
This blocks any hotkeys that have been registered by applications
from having any effect beyond generating raw WM_INPUT events.

This flag does not affect system-hotkeys like ALT-TAB or
CTRL-ALT-DEL, but does affect the Windows Logo key since it is a
userland hotkey registered by explorer.exe.
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Hotkeys are not excluded. (default)
"1": Hotkeys are excluded.
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.4.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_RAW_KEYBOARD_INPUTSINK
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether the RIDEV_INPUTSINK flag is set when
enabling Windows raw keyboard events.
remarks:
This enables the window to still receive input even if not in
foreground.

Focused windows that receive text input will still prevent input
events from triggering.

"0": Input is not received when not in focus or foreground.
(default)

"1": Input will be received even when not in focus or
foreground.
This hint can be set anytime.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.4.4.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_WINDOWS_USE_D3D9EX
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether SDL uses the D3D9Ex API introduced in
Windows Vista, instead of normal D3D9.
remarks:
Direct3D 9Ex contains changes to state management that can eliminate
device loss errors during scenarios like Alt+Tab or UAC prompts. D3D9Ex
may require some changes to your application to cope with the new
behavior, so this is disabled by default.
For more information on Direct3D 9Ex, see:
https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/direct3darticles/graphics-apis-in-windows-vista#direct3d-9ex
https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/direct3darticles/direct3d-9ex-improvements
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Use the original Direct3D 9 API. (default)

"1": Use the Direct3D 9Ex API on Vista and later (and fall back if
D3D9Ex is unavailable)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_X11_FORCE_OVERRIDE_REDIRECT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether X11 windows are marked as
override-redirect.
remarks:
If set, this might increase framerate at the expense of the
desktop not working as expected. Override-redirect windows aren't
noticed by the window manager at all.

You should probably only use this for fullscreen windows, and you
probably shouldn't even use it for that. But it's here if you want to
try!
The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Do not mark the window as override-redirect. (default)
"1": Mark the window as override-redirect.
This hint should be set before creating a window.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_X11_WINDOW_TYPE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A variable specifying the type of an X11 window.
remarks:
During SDL_CreateWindow , SDL uses
the _NET_WM_WINDOW_TYPE X11 property to report to the window manager the
type of window it wants to create. This might be set to various things
if SDL_WINDOW_TOOLTIP or SDL_WINDOW_POPUP_MENU , etc, were
specified. For "normal" windows that haven't set a specific type, this
hint can be used to specify a custom type. For example, a dock window
might set this to "_NET_WM_WINDOW_TYPE_DOCK".
This hint should be set before creating a window.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_X11_XCB_LIBRARY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Specify the XCB library to load for the X11 driver.
remarks: The default is platform-specific, often "libX11-xcb.so.1".
This hint should be set before initializing the video subsystem.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_HINT_XINPUT_ENABLED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A variable controlling whether XInput should be used for controller
handling.
remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": XInput is not enabled.
"1": XInput is enabled. (default)
This hint should be set before SDL is initialized.
macros.version: This hint is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_ICONV_E2BIG
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Please refer to SDL_iconv for
details.

macros.name: SDL_ICONV_EILSEQ
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Please refer to SDL_iconv for
details.

macros.name: SDL_ICONV_EINVAL
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Please refer to SDL_iconv for
details.

macros.name: SDL_ICONV_ERROR
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Please refer to SDL_iconv for
details.

macros.name: SDL_iconv_utf8_locale
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Convert a UTF-8 string to the current locale's character
encoding.
macros.returns:
Returns a new string, converted to the new encoding, or NULL on
error.
remarks:
This is a helper macro that might be more clear than calling SDL_iconv_string directly. However, it
double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use an expression with
side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_iconv_utf8_ucs2
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Convert a UTF-8 string to UCS-2.
macros.returns:
Returns a new string, converted to the new encoding, or NULL on
error.
remarks:
This is a helper macro that might be more clear than calling SDL_iconv_string directly. However, it
double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use an expression with
side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_iconv_utf8_ucs4
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Convert a UTF-8 string to UCS-4.
macros.returns:
Returns a new string, converted to the new encoding, or NULL on
error.
remarks:
This is a helper macro that might be more clear than calling SDL_iconv_string directly. However, it
double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use an expression with
side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.

macros.name: SDL_iconv_wchar_utf8

macros.name: SDL_IN_BYTECAP

macros.description: Macro that annotates function params with input buffer size.
remarks: If we were to annotate memcpy :

void * memcpy ( void * dst , SDL_IN_BYTECAP ( len ) const void * src , size_t len );
 This notes that src should be len bytes in
size and is only read by the function. The compiler or other analysis
tools can warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

remarks:
This is a hint to the compiler to inline a function. The compiler is

macros.name: SDL_INOUT_Z_CAP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates function params with input/output string buffer
size.
remarks: If we were to annotate strlcat :

size_t strlcat ( SDL_INOUT_Z_CAP ( maxlen ) char * dst , const char * src , size_t maxlen );
 This notes that dst is a null-terminated C string,
should be maxlen bytes in size, and is both read from and
written to by the function. The compiler or other analysis tools can
warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_10BIT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to determine if an SDL_PixelFormat is a 10-bit format.
macros.returns: Returns true if the format is 10-bit, false otherwise.
remarks:
Note that this macro double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use
expressions with side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ALPHA
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A macro to determine if an SDL_PixelFormat has an alpha
channel.
macros.syntax:
#define SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ALPHA(format) \
 ((SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_PACKED(format) && \
 ((SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_PACKEDORDER_ARGB) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_PACKEDORDER_RGBA) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_PACKEDORDER_ABGR) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_PACKEDORDER_BGRA))) || \
 (SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ARRAY(format) && \
 ((SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_ARRAYORDER_ARGB) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_ARRAYORDER_RGBA) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_ARRAYORDER_ABGR) || \
 (SDL_PIXELORDER(format) == SDL_ARRAYORDER_BGRA))))
macros.returns: Returns true if the format has alpha, false otherwise.
remarks:
Note that this macro double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use
expressions with side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ARRAY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to determine if an SDL_PixelFormat is an array format.
macros.syntax:
#define SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_ARRAY(format) \
 (!SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_FOURCC(format) && \
 ((SDL_PIXELTYPE(format) == SDL_PIXELTYPE_ARRAYU8) || \
 (SDL_PIXELTYPE(format) == SDL_PIXELTYPE_ARRAYU16) || \
 (SDL_PIXELTYPE(format) == SDL_PIXELTYPE_ARRAYU32) || \
 (SDL_PIXELTYPE(format) == SDL_PIXELTYPE_ARRAYF16) || \
 (SDL_PIXELTYPE(format) == SDL_PIXELTYPE_ARRAYF32)))
macros.returns: Returns true if the format is an array, false otherwise.
remarks:
Note that this macro double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use
expressions with side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_FLOAT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:

macros.returns: Returns true if the format is a floating point, false otherwise.
remarks:

macros.name: SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_FOURCC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A macro to determine if an SDL_PixelFormat is a "FourCC"
format.
macros.syntax:
#define SDL_ISPIXELFORMAT_FOURCC(format) /* The flag is set to 1 because 0x1? is not in the printable ASCII range */ \
 ((format) && (SDL_PIXELFLAG(format) != 1))
macros.returns: Returns true if the format has alpha, false otherwise.
remarks: This covers custom and other unusual formats.

Note that this macro double-evaluates its parameter, so do not use
expressions with side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MAIN_AVAILABLE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Defined if the target platform offers a special mainline through
SDL.
remarks:
This won't be defined otherwise. If defined, SDL's headers will
redefine main to SDL_main .

This macro is defined by SDL_main.h , which is not
automatically included by SDL.h .

Even if available, an app can define SDL_MAIN_HANDLED and provide their own,
if they know what they're doing.

This macro is used internally by SDL, and apps probably shouldn't
rely on it.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MAIN_HANDLED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Inform SDL that the app is providing an entry point instead of
SDL.
remarks:
SDL does not define this macro, but will check if it is defined when
including SDL_main.h . If defined, SDL will expect the app
to provide the proper entry point for the platform, and all the other
magic details needed, like manually calling SDL_SetMainReady .

Please see README-main-functions , (or
docs/README-main-functions.md in the source tree) for a more detailed
explanation.
macros.version: This macro is used by the headers since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MAIN_NEEDED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Defined if the target platform requires a special mainline
through SDL.
remarks:

This macro is defined by SDL_main.h , which is not

Even if required, an app can define SDL_MAIN_HANDLED and provide their own,

macros.name: SDL_MAIN_USE_CALLBACKS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Inform SDL to use the main callbacks instead of main.
remarks:
SDL does not define this macro, but will check if it is defined when
including SDL_main.h . If defined, SDL will expect the app
to provide several functions: SDL_AppInit , SDL_AppEvent , SDL_AppIterate , and SDL_AppQuit . The app should not provide a
 main function in this case, and doing so will likely cause
the build to fail.

Please see README-main-functions , (or
docs/README-main-functions.md in the source tree) for a more detailed
explanation.
macros.version: This macro is used by the headers since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MALLOC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to tag a function as an allocator.
remarks:
This is a hint to the compiler that a function is an allocator, like
malloc(), with certain rules. A description of how GCC treats this hint
is here:
https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/Common-Function-Attributes.html#index-malloc-function-attribute

On compilers without allocator tag support, this is defined to
nothing.
Most apps don't need to, and should not, use this directly.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MALLOC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

macros.description: Return the greater of two values.
macros.returns: Returns the greater of x and y .
remarks:
This is a helper macro that might be more clear than writing out the
comparisons directly, and works with any type that can be compared with
the > operator. However, it double-evaluates both its
parameters, so do not use expressions with side-effects here.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MemoryBarrierAcquire
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Insert a memory acquire barrier (macro version).
remarks:
Please see SDL_MemoryBarrierRelease for
the details on what memory barriers are and when to use them.

This is the macro version of this functionality; if possible, SDL
will use compiler intrinsics or inline assembly, but some platforms
might need to call the function version of this, SDL_MemoryBarrierAcquireFunction ,
to do the heavy lifting. Apps that can use the macro should favor it
over the function.
macros.threadSafety:
Obviously this macro is safe to use from any thread at any time, but
if you find yourself needing this, you are probably dealing with some
very sensitive code; be careful!
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_MemoryBarrierRelease
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Insert a memory release barrier (macro version).
remarks:
Memory barriers are designed to prevent reads and writes from being
reordered by the compiler and being seen out of order on multi-core
CPUs.

A typical pattern would be for thread A to write some data and a
flag, and for thread B to read the flag and get the data. In this case
you would insert a release barrier between writing the data and the
flag, guaranteeing that the data write completes no later than the flag
is written, and you would insert an acquire barrier between reading the
flag and reading the data, to ensure that all the reads associated with
the flag have completed.

In this pattern you should always see a release barrier paired with
an acquire barrier and you should gate the data reads/writes with a
single flag variable.

For more information on these semantics, take a look at the blog
post: http://preshing.com/20120913/acquire-and-release-semantics

This is the macro version of this functionality; if possible, SDL
will use compiler intrinsics or inline assembly, but some platforms
might need to call the function version of this, SDL_MemoryBarrierReleaseFunction
to do the heavy lifting. Apps that can use the macro should favor it
over the function.
macros.threadSafety:
Obviously this macro is safe to use from any thread at any time, but
if you find yourself needing this, you are probably dealing with some
very sensitive code; be careful!
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NO_THREAD_SAFETY_ANALYSIS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NODISCARD
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to tag a function's return value as critical.
remarks:
This is a hint to the compiler that a function's return value should
not be ignored.

If an NODISCARD function's return value is thrown away (the function
is called as if it returns void ), the compiler will issue a
warning.

While it's generally good practice to check return values for errors,
often times legitimate programs do not for good reasons. Be careful
about what functions are tagged as NODISCARD. It operates best when used
on a function that's failure is surprising and catastrophic; a good
example would be a program that checks the return values of all its file
write function calls but not the call to close the file, which it
assumes incorrectly never fails.

Function callers that want to throw away a NODISCARD return value can
call the function with a (void) cast, which informs the
compiler the act is intentional.

On compilers without nodiscard support, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NOLONGLONG
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Don't let SDL use "long long" C types.
remarks:
SDL will define this if it believes the compiler doesn't understand
the "long long" syntax for C datatypes. This can happen on older
compilers.

If your compiler doesn't support "long long" but SDL doesn't
know it, it is safe to define this yourself to build against the SDL
headers.

If this is defined, it will remove access to some C runtime support
functions, like SDL_ulltoa and SDL_strtoll that refer to this datatype
explicitly. The rest of SDL will still be available.

SDL's own source code cannot be built with a compiler that has this
defined, for various technical reasons.

macros.name: SDL_NORETURN
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to tag a function as never-returning.
remarks:
This is a hint to the compiler that a function does not return. An
example of a function like this is the C runtime's exit() function.

This hint can lead to code optimizations, and help analyzers
understand code flow better. On compilers without noreturn support, this
is defined to nothing.

This symbol is used in SDL's headers, but apps and other libraries
are welcome to use it for their own interfaces as well.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NS_PER_MS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Number of nanoseconds in a millisecond.
remarks: This is always 1000000.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NS_PER_SECOND
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Number of nanoseconds in a second.
remarks: This is always 1000000000.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NS_PER_US
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Number of nanoseconds in a microsecond.
remarks: This is always 1000.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NS_TO_MS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Convert nanoseconds to milliseconds.
macros.returns: Returns NS, expressed in milliseconds.
remarks:
This performs a division, so the results can be dramatically
different if NS is an integer or floating point value.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

remarks:
This performs a division, so the results can be dramatically
different if NS is an integer or floating point value.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_NS_TO_US
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.

macros.name: SDL_NULL_WHILE_LOOP_CONDITION
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A macro for wrapping code in do {} while (0); without
compiler warnings.
remarks:
Visual Studio with really aggressive warnings enabled needs this to
avoid compiler complaints.

the do {} while (0); trick is useful for wrapping code
in a macro that may or may not be a single statement, to avoid various C
language accidents.
To use:
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_OUT_BYTECAP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Macro that annotates function params with output buffer size.
remarks: If we were to annotate memcpy :

void * memcpy ( SDL_OUT_BYTECAP ( bufsize ) void * dst , const void * src , size_t bufsize );
 This notes that dst should have a capacity of
 bufsize bytes in size, and is only written to by the
function. The compiler or other analysis tools can warn when this
doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_OUT_CAP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Macro that annotates function params with output buffer size.
remarks: If we were to annotate wcsncpy :

char * wcscpy ( SDL_OUT_CAP ( bufsize ) wchar_t * dst , const wchar_t * src , size_t bufsize );
 This notes that dst should have a capacity of
 bufsize wchar_t in size, and is only written to by the
function. The compiler or other analysis tools can warn when this
doesn't appear to be the case.
This operates on counts of objects, not bytes. Use SDL_OUT_BYTECAP for bytes.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_OUT_Z_BYTECAP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates function params with output buffer string
size.
remarks: If we were to annotate strcpy :

char * strcpy ( SDL_OUT_Z_BYTECAP ( bufsize ) char * dst , const char * src , size_t bufsize );
 This notes that dst should have a capacity of
 bufsize bytes in size, and a zero-terminated string is
written to it by the function. The compiler or other analysis tools can
warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_OUT_Z_CAP
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates function params with output string buffer
size.
remarks: If we were to annotate snprintf :

int snprintf ( SDL_OUT_Z_CAP ( maxlen ) char * text , size_t maxlen , const char * fmt , ...);
 This notes that text is a null-terminated C string,
should be maxlen bytes in size, and is only written to by
the function. The compiler or other analysis tools can warn when this
doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.returns: Returns the layout of format .
remarks:

if a layout doesn't make sense for the format type.

macros.description: A macro to retrieve the order of an SDL_PixelFormat .
macros.returns: Returns the order of format .
remarks:
This is usually a value from the SDL_BitmapOrder , SDL_PackedOrder , or SDL_ArrayOrder enumerations, depending on
the format type.

macros.name: SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates function params as printf-style format
strings.
remarks: If we were to annotate fprintf :

int fprintf ( FILE * f , SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING const char * fmt , ...);
 This notes that fmt should be a printf-style format
string. The compiler or other analysis tools can warn when this doesn't
appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Macro that annotates a vararg function that operates like printf.
remarks: If we were to annotate fprintf :

int fprintf ( FILE * f , const char * fmt , ...) SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNC ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a printf-style format
string, followed by ... . The compiler or other analysis
tools can warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING as
well, which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNCV
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates a va_list function that operates like
printf.
remarks: If we were to annotate vfprintf :

int vfprintf ( FILE * f , const char * fmt , va_list ap ) SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNCV ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a printf-style format
string, followed by a va_list. The compiler or other analysis tools can
warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING as
well, which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_PROP_GLOBAL_VIDEO_WAYLAND_WL_DISPLAY_POINTER
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
The pointer to the global wl_display object used by the
Wayland video backend.
remarks:
Can be set before the video subsystem is initialized to import an
external wl_display object from an application or toolkit
for use in SDL, or read after initialization to export the
 wl_display used by the Wayland video backend. Setting this
property after the video subsystem has been initialized has no effect,
and reading it when the video subsystem is uninitialized will either
return the user provided value, if one was set prior to initialization,
or NULL. See docs/README-wayland.md for more information.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_PROP_NAME_STRING
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A generic property for naming things.
remarks:
This property is intended to be added to any SDL_PropertiesID that needs a generic
name associated with the property set. It is not guaranteed that any
property set will include this key, but it is convenient to have a
standard key that any piece of code could reasonably agree to use.

For example, the properties associated with an SDL_Texture might have a name string of
"player sprites", or an SDL_AudioStream might have "background
music", etc. This might also be useful for an SDL_IOStream to list the path to its
asset.

There is no format for the value set with this key; it is expected to
be human-readable and informational in nature, possibly for logging or
debugging purposes.

SDL does not currently set this property on any objects it creates,
but this may change in later versions; it is currently expected that
apps and external libraries will take advantage of it, when
appropriate.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.4.0.

macros.name: SDL_PT_GUARDED_BY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_reinterpret_cast
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Handle a Reinterpret Cast properly whether using C or C++.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_reinterpret_cast(type, expression) reinterpret_cast<type>(expression) /* or `((type)(expression))` in C */
macros.returns: Returns expression , cast to type .
remarks:
If compiled as C++, this macro offers a proper C++
reinterpret_cast<>.
If compiled as C, this macro does a normal C-style cast.
This is helpful to avoid compiler warnings in C++.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_RESTRICT
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to tag a pointer variable, to help with pointer aliasing.
remarks: A good explanation of the restrict keyword is here:
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Restrict

On compilers without restrict support, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.4.0.

macros.name: SDL_RETURN_CAPABILITY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_REVISION
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
This macro is a string describing the source at a particular point in
development.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_REVISION "Some arbitrary string decided at SDL build time"
remarks:
This string is often generated from revision control's state at build
time.

This string can be quite complex and does not follow any standard.
For example, it might be something like
"SDL-prerelease-3.1.1-47-gf687e0732". It might also be user-defined at
build time, so it's best to treat it as a clue in debugging forensics
and not something the app will parse in any way.

SDL_revision .h must be included in
your program explicitly if you want access to the SDL_REVISION constant.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SCANCODE_TO_KEYCODE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Please refer to SDL_Keycode for
details.

macros.name: SDL_SCANF_FORMAT_STRING
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates function params as scanf-style format
strings.
remarks: If we were to annotate fscanf :

int fscanf ( FILE * f , SDL_SCANF_FORMAT_STRING const char * fmt , ...);
 This notes that fmt should be a scanf-style format
string. The compiler or other analysis tools can warn when this doesn't
appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SCANF_VARARG_FUNC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Macro that annotates a vararg function that operates like scanf.
remarks: If we were to annotate fscanf :

int fscanf ( FILE * f , const char * fmt , ...) SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNCV ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a scanf-style format
string, followed by ... . The compiler or other analysis
tools can warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_SCANF_FORMAT_STRING as well,
which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SCANF_VARARG_FUNCV
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Macro that annotates a va_list function that operates like scanf.
remarks: If we were to annotate vfscanf :

int vfscanf ( FILE * f , const char * fmt , va_list ap ) SDL_PRINTF_VARARG_FUNCV ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a scanf-style format
string, followed by a va_list. The compiler or other analysis tools can
warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_SCANF_FORMAT_STRING as well,
which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SCOPED_CAPABILITY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SECONDS_TO_NS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Convert seconds to nanoseconds.
macros.returns: Returns S, expressed in nanoseconds.
remarks: This only converts whole numbers, not fractional seconds.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SINT64_C
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Append the 64 bit integer suffix to a signed integer literal.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_SINT64_C(c) c ## LL /* or whatever the current compiler uses. */
remarks:
This helps compilers that might believe a integer literal larger than
0xFFFFFFFF is overflowing a 32-bit value. Use
 SDL_SINT64_C(0xFFFFFFFF1) instead of
 0xFFFFFFFF1 by itself.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SIZE_MAX
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
The largest value that a size_t can hold for the target
platform.
remarks:
size_t is generally the same size as a pointer in modern
times, but this can get weird on very old and very esoteric machines.
For example, on a 16-bit Intel 286, you might have a 32-bit "far"
pointer (16-bit segment plus 16-bit offset), but size_t is
16 bits, because it can only deal with the offset into an individual
segment.

In modern times, it's generally expected to cover an entire linear
address space. But be careful!
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SOFTWARE_RENDERER
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: The name of the software renderer.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_SSE_INTRINSICS
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Defined if (and only if) the compiler supports Intel SSE
intrinsics.
remarks:
If this macro is defined, SDL will have already included
 <xmmintrin.h>

macros.name: SDL_stack_alloc
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Allocate memory on the stack (maybe).
macros.returns: Returns newly-allocated memory, or NULL on failure.
remarks:
If SDL knows how to access alloca() on the current platform, it will
use it to stack-allocate memory here. If it doesn't, it will use SDL_malloc () to heap-allocate memory.

Since this might not be stack memory at all, it's important that you
check the returned pointer for NULL, and that you call SDL_stack_free on the memory when done
with it. Since this might be stack memory, it's important that you don't
allocate large amounts of it, or allocate in a loop without returning
from the function, so the stack doesn't overflow.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_stack_free
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Free memory previously allocated with SDL_stack_alloc .
remarks:
If SDL used alloca() to allocate this memory, this macro does nothing
and the allocated memory will be automatically released when the
function that called SDL_stack_alloc () returns. If SDL used
 SDL_malloc (), it will SDL_free the memory immediately.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_STANDARD_GRAVITY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A constant to represent standard gravity for accelerometer
sensors.
remarks:
The accelerometer returns the current acceleration in SI meters per
second squared. This measurement includes the force of gravity, so a
device at rest will have an value of SDL_STANDARD_GRAVITY away from the
center of the earth, which is a positive Y value.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_static_cast
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Handle a Static Cast properly whether using C or C++.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_static_cast(type, expression) static_cast<type>(expression) /* or `((type)(expression))` in C */
macros.returns: Returns expression , cast to type .
remarks:
If compiled as C++, this macro offers a proper C++
static_cast<>.
If compiled as C, this macro does a normal C-style cast.
This is helpful to avoid compiler warnings in C++.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_TARGETING
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
A macro to tag a function as targeting a specific CPU
architecture.
remarks:
This is a hint to the compiler that a function should be built with
support for a CPU instruction set that might be different than the rest
of the program.
The particulars of this are explained in the GCC documentation:
https://gcc.gnu.org/onlinedocs/gcc/Common-Function-Attributes.html#index-target-function-attribute

An example of using this feature is to turn on SSE2 support for a
specific function, even if the rest of the source code is not compiled
to use SSE2 code:
On compilers without target support, this is defined to nothing.

This symbol is used by SDL internally, but apps and other libraries
are welcome to use it for their own interfaces as well.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.description: Enable thread safety attributes, only with clang.
remarks:
The attributes can be safely erased when compiling with other
compilers.

To enable analysis, set these environment variables before running
cmake:

macros.name: SDL_TriggerBreakpoint
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Attempt to tell an attached debugger to pause.
remarks:
This allows an app to programmatically halt ("break") the debugger as
if it had hit a breakpoint, allowing the developer to examine program
state, etc.

This is a macro--not a function--so that the debugger breaks on the
source code line that used SDL_TriggerBreakpoint and not in
some random guts of SDL. SDL_assert uses
this macro for the same reason.

If the program is not running under a debugger, SDL_TriggerBreakpoint will likely
terminate the app, possibly without warning. If the current platform
isn't supported, this macro is left undefined.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_TRY_ACQUIRE
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_TRY_ACQUIRE_SHARED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Wrapper around Clang thread safety analysis annotations.
remarks: Please see https://clang.llvm.org/docs/ThreadSafetyAnalysis.html#mutex-h

macros.name: SDL_UINT64_C
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Append the 64 bit integer suffix to an unsigned integer literal.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_UINT64_C(c) c ## ULL /* or whatever the current compiler uses. */
remarks:
This helps compilers that might believe a integer literal larger than
0xFFFFFFFF is overflowing a 32-bit value. Use
 SDL_UINT64_C(0xFFFFFFFF1) instead of
 0xFFFFFFFF1 by itself.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_Unsupported

macros.description: A macro to standardize error reporting on unsupported operations.
macros.syntax: #define SDL_Unsupported() SDL_SetError("That operation is not supported")
remarks:
This simply calls SDL_SetError () with
a standardized error string, for convenience, consistency, and
clarity.

macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Used to indicate that the window position should be centered.
remarks: This always uses the primary display.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED_DISPLAY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Used to indicate that the window position should be centered.
remarks:
SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED is
the same, but always uses the primary display instead of specifying
one.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED_MASK
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A magic value used with SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED .
remarks: Generally this macro isn't used directly, but rather through SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED or SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED_DISPLAY .
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_ISCENTERED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to test if the window position is marked as "centered."
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_ISUNDEFINED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to test if the window position is marked as "undefined."
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Used to indicate that you don't care what the window position/display
is.
remarks: This always uses the primary display.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED_DISPLAY
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Used to indicate that you don't care what the window position is.
remarks:
If you really don't care, SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED is the
same, but always uses the primary display instead of specifying one.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED_MASK
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A magic value used with SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED .
remarks: Generally this macro isn't used directly, but rather through SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED or SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED_DISPLAY .
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WPRINTF_VARARG_FUNC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates a vararg function that operates like
wprintf.
remarks: If we were to annotate fwprintf :

int fwprintf ( FILE * f , const wchar_t * fmt , ...) SDL_WPRINTF_VARARG_FUNC ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a wprintf-style format
wide string, followed by ... . The compiler or other
analysis tools can warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING as
well, which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_WPRINTF_VARARG_FUNCV
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description:
Macro that annotates a va_list function that operates like
wprintf.
remarks: If we were to annotate vfwprintf :

int vfwprintf ( FILE * f , const wchar_t * fmt , va_list ap ) SDL_WPRINTF_VARARG_FUNC ( 2 );
 This notes that the second parameter should be a wprintf-style format
wide string, followed by a va_list. The compiler or other analysis tools
can warn when this doesn't appear to be the case.

On compilers without this annotation mechanism, this is defined to
nothing.

This can (and should) be used with SDL_PRINTF_FORMAT_STRING as
well, which between them will cover at least Visual Studio, GCC, and
Clang.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_zero
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Clear an object's memory to zero.
remarks:
This is wrapper over SDL_memset that
handles calculating the object size, so there's no chance of copy/paste
errors, and the code is cleaner.

This requires an object, not a pointer to an object, nor an
array.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_zeroa
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Clear an array's memory to zero.
remarks:
This is wrapper over SDL_memset that
handles calculating the array size, so there's no chance of copy/paste
errors, and the code is cleaner.

This requires an array, not an object, nor a pointer to an
object.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDL_zerop
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: Clear an object's memory to zero, using a pointer.
remarks:
This is wrapper over SDL_memset that
handles calculating the object size, so there's no chance of copy/paste
errors, and the code is cleaner.

This requires a pointer to an object, not an object itself, nor an
array.
macros.threadSafety: It is safe to call this macro from any thread.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDLCALL
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to set a function's calling conventions.
remarks:
SDL uses this macro for all its public functions, and any callbacks
it defines. This macro guarantees that calling conventions match between
SDL and the app, even if the two were built with different compilers or
optimization settings.

When writing a callback function, it is very important for it to be
correctly tagged with SDLCALL, as mismatched calling conventions can
cause strange behaviors and can be difficult to diagnose. Plus, on many
platforms, SDLCALL is defined to nothing, so compilers won't be able to
warn that the tag is missing.

This symbol is used in SDL's headers, but apps and other libraries
are welcome to use it for their own interfaces as well.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.

macros.name: SDLMAIN_DECLSPEC
macros.packageDescription: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3 وتشمل إدارة النافذة والإدخال والأحداث والصوت والربط مع واجهات الرسوميات مثل Vulkan.
macros.description: A macro to tag a main entry point function as exported.
remarks:
Most platforms don't need this, and the macro will be defined to
nothing. Some, like Android, keep the entry points in a shared library
and need to explicitly export the symbols.

External code rarely needs this, and if it needs something, it's
almost always SDL_DECLSPEC instead.
macros.version: This macro is available since SDL 3.2.0.
